Bus Timings

Discover the 50 Bus Timings Business Bay 2 to International City Bus Station

June 11, 2025
By Al Khaleej
Install
★★★★★ 5.0
Google Play Official App
UAE Bus Timing

Travel across the UAE with confidence. No confusion. No wasted time.

Dubai Bus 50 provides a vital transportation link between Business Bay 2 Bus Station and International City Bus Station. It caters to commuters and travelers looking to navigate through key business districts and residential areas across Dubai.

Bus Timings

Bus 50 operates with a regular schedule to ensure timely departures and arrivals throughout the day. Timings start from Business Bay 2 Bus Station at 10:40 AM and continue with departures approximately every 30-40 minutes until midnight.

From Business Bay 2 From International City Bus Station
06:00 07:15
06:25 07:40
07:00 08:15
07:20 08:35
07:50 09:05
08:20 09:35
08:48 10:03
09:15 10:30
09:40 10:55
10:05 11:20
10:40 11:55
11:05 12:20
11:30 12:45
11:55 13:10
12:25 13:40
12:55 14:10
13:20 14:35
13:50 15:05
14:20 15:35
14:50 16:05
15:15 16:30
15:40 16:55
16:05 17:20
16:35 17:50
17:00 18:15
17:20 18:35
17:45 19:00
18:10 19:25
18:35 19:50
19:00 20:15
19:25 20:40
19:50 21:05
20:20 21:35
20:45 22:00
21:10 22:25
21:35 22:50
22:00 23:15
22:25 23:40
23:00 00:15
00:00 01:15

Download PDF Bus 50

Bus 50 Timetable

For the full schedule, you can visit the official RTA website or follow this link to view the 50 Bus Timings.

Bus Route

The 50 route includes stops at the following locations:

  • Business Bay 2 Bus Station · 3

  • Empire Heights Towers
  • Collapse
  • Coral Tower
  • Canal View Hotel Apartments
  • Bay Square
  • South Ridge Tower
  • Burj View Central Tower
  • Dubai Fountain Street
  • Emirates NBD
  • Nad Al Shiba 2, Main Masjid
  • Nad Al Shiba, Intersection
  • Silicon Oasis Headquarters
  • SIT Tower
  • Silicon Oasis North Park
  • Dubai Academic City, 3
  • Dubai Outsource City, Royal Bank of Scotland
  • Arab Company
  • Dubai Outsource City, 2
  • Dubai Outsource City
  • Manama Road, 6
  • International City, Greece
  • Civil Defence
  • Post Office
  • Dragon Mart 1 External
  • Dragon Mart 2 External
  • Dragon Mart 2
  • Ibis Styles Hotel
  • International City Bus Station · 1

Bus 50 Station Overview

Business Bay 2 Bus Station

The Business Bay 2 Bus Station is a key transit hub situated in the heart of Dubai’s vibrant Business Bay district. This station caters to the needs of professionals and residents in the area, offering a range of amenities such as comfortable seating, ticketing services, and real-time bus schedule updates.

Its location supports efficient connectivity with nearby commercial and residential properties, as well as other transportation networks. The station’s strategic placement ensures that passengers can easily access business centers, dining options, and entertainment venues within the Business Bay area.

Al Warsan 1, Eppco 1 Bus Stop Intersection

Recommended Guides

Enhance your daily commute with these essential transport guides:

Complete RTA Intercity Routes Guide Largest Bus Stations Infrastructure in UAE

The Al Warsan 1, Eppco 1 Bus Stop is a key junction where Routes 50, X23, 310, and E16 intersect. This bus stop serves as a vital hub for commuters traveling to and from the Al Warsan area, offering diverse route options that connect to various parts of the city. The intersection of these routes ensures convenient and efficient transit, making it an essential stop for daily travelers and residents.

International City Bus Station

The International City Bus Station serves the expansive International City development, a major residential and commercial zone in Dubai.

Its position within the International City area facilitates easy access to nearby shops, services, and residential communities. The station plays an important role in connecting passengers to various destinations within the development and to other parts of the city.

Bus Ticket Price

The fare for Bus 50 is affordable with AED 3-5, reflecting Dubai’s public transport pricing structure, which offers economical travel options for both residents and visitors.

Bus Booking

While online booking options for individual bus tickets may vary, passengers can access real-time schedules and plan their journeys using the Roads and Transport Authority (RTA) official app or website. This provides convenience and ensures travelers are informed about route changes or updates.

Journey Experience

International City is also home to Dragon Mart, the largest Chinese trading hub outside China, making it a destination for unique shopping experiences.

Traveling with Careem

This route offers a cost-effective travel option with fares ranging between AED 67 to 81.

Exploring Dubai via Bus 50 not only facilitates efficient travel across diverse neighborhoods but also offers a cost-effective means of experiencing the city’s attractions and business hubs. Whether for daily commuting or leisurely explorations, Bus 50 remains a reliable choice for navigating Dubai’s extensive public transport network.

Official UAE Sources

For the latest schedules, fares, and policy updates, verify with these primary sources:

  • RTA Journey Planner
  • RTA Intercity Timetable Reference (E100)
  • Abu Dhabi Mobility
  • Sharjah Roads and Transport Authority (SRTA)

Editorial review date: June 11, 2025.
